name: TropiGolf
about: TropiGolf is an indoor golf simulator facility featuring two spacious bays powered by industry-leading TrackMan technology. The venue offers a tropical-inspired setting with a focus on providing a true-to-life golfing experience through its high-precision simulators, which deliver stunning course graphics and real-time performance feedback. Operations are centered on unmanned, online-only bookings, allowing for convenient time slot reservations without a check-in desk. The facility caters to golfers looking to practice, play world-famous courses, or enjoy a fun escape in a relaxed environment. Pricing is based on hourly rates with off-peak and peak hour tiers, and memberships are available for regular players. Winter leagues are also offered, providing a competitive and social element to the experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by industry-leading TrackMan simulators for unmatched accuracy and real-time performance feedback
Convenient unmanned, online-only bookings that eliminate the hassle of a check-in desk
Tropical-inspired indoor setting provides a relaxing and unique escape for playing or practicing

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food to enjoy while playing, particularly for league sessions.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two spacious bays powered by TrackMan simulators.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are welcome to bring their own food to enjoy while playing. However, there is no mention of alcohol service or a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration required to play 18 holes. This information may be available during the booking process or by contacting the venue directly.

faq.question: Is TropiGolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and appears to be kid-friendly. The casual environment and the ability to bring your own food make it an accessible option for a family outing.
